mapper.select: SELECT * FROM shelf ORDER BY shelf_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shelf (shelf_code, capacity, used_count, status) VALUES (#{shelfCode}, #{capacity}, #{usedCount}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE shelf SET used_count = used_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE shelf SET used_count = used_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND used_count > 0
